args: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . .env; set +a; if [ -z "${DOTMAC_ERP_DB_DSN:-}" ]; then echo "DOTMAC_ERP_DB_DSN is required (export it or set it in .env). Example: postgresql://claude_readonly:<password>@localhost:5437/dotmac_erp" >&2; exit 1; fi; exec npx -y @bytebase/dbhub --dsn "$DOTMAC_ERP_DB_DSN"
erp-db.description: DotMac ERP database - read-only queries for debugging and analysis
